sections.paragraph:
Original: מאיה מאה

Transliteration: mê'âh mê'yâh

Phonetic: may-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. hundred
    1. as simple number
    2. as part of larger number
    3. as a fraction - one one-hundredth (1/100)

Origin: properly, a primitive numeral; a hundred

TWOT entry: 1135

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
